callGraph.callee:
select(MissionRuntime)
                .where(
                    MissionRuntime.state.in_(TERMINAL_STATES),
                    MissionRuntime.resume_metadata != cast({}, JSONB),
                    MissionRuntime.mission_params != cast({}, JSONB),
                )
                .order_by(MissionRuntime.created_at.desc())
                .limit

                )
                .order_by
